description: Execute a plan until it is complete

content: Please read AGENTS.md and follow its instructions. Use fresh disk reads and current git state, not conversational memory. Re-read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json` from disk first, for example with `cat codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json`, and treat it as the sole source of review scope for this flow. Determine the active `plan_path`, then extract repository paths from `additional_repositories` in that handoff file, and re-open that exact relative `plan_path` from disk using explicit shell reads such as `sed`, `cat`, or `rg`. If the handoff does not explicitly identify any additional repositories, treat that as none. The current repository is the canonical plan host and is implicitly in scope. If it also appears inside `additional_repositories`, treat that as redundant and ignore that entry. Re-check the current repository branch directly from git, for example with `git branch --show-current`, and re-check each participating additional repository branch directly from git, for example with `git -C <repo_root> branch --show-current`. Verify that the selected plan exists in the current repository, that the selected plan filename carries the story number that matches the current repository branch, and that each participating additional repository is on a branch whose story number matches the selected plan filename. If those checks fail, stop and say the current-plan handoff is stale and must be regenerated. Do NOT use code_info tools for plan selection. Confirm what story the normalized review scope represents, list the participating repositories when there is more than one, and provide me with an overview of what is still remaining to be done without making file changes at this time.

steps.label: Filter Review Findings To Story Scope
Promote Actionable Review Findings To Minor Path
Exit Minor-Fix Path Unless Minor Findings Remain
steps.question: Run `python3 "$CODEINFO_ROOT/scripts/flow_control/check_review_minor_fix_path_clear.py"` now. Do not rely on any previous command output, prior run, cached result, or conversational memory, because repository files and workflow state may have changed since the last time this command was run. This command is authoritative. Return its current stdout exactly and nothing else. Do not read any other files. Do not recompute the answer.

Refresh Current Plan Handoff After Review Task-Up
Ensure Review-Created Testing Steps Are Correct

Exit Task-Up Path After Encoding Review Findings

steps.label: Generate Or Update Final Revalidation Task For Minor Fixes

content: Read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json` from disk first, for example with `cat codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json`, determine the active `plan_path`, then extract repository paths from `additional_repositories` as the active scope for this flow. If possible, git push the story branch in the current repository and in every repository listed in `additional_repositories`.
